note: Work items for the fork. Exactly one item may be in_progress at a time. Statuses: pending | in_progress | done. Update together with PROGRESS.md.

features.name: Sync main/dev with upstream 0.55.0
features.description: Mirror upstream nank1ro/flutter-shadcn-ui into main and dev at package version 0.55.0.
features.done_when: main and dev contain upstream 0.55.0 and make check passes
features.evidence: pubspec.yaml version: 0.55.0; dev c5ddeed merged to main via PR #4 (8ade01e)

features.name: atomsn pin points at usn branch tip
features.description: Consumer atom-sn-flutter/packages/atomsn pins this repo at the tip of usn/0.54.0-elms-huge.
features.done_when: pubspec ref SHA equals tip of the consumed usn/* branch

features.name: Agent harness (instructions, state, verification, scope, lifecycle)
features.description: AGENTS.md workflow sections, feature_list.json, progress.md, init.sh, session-handoff.md; fix stale facts in the previous docs pass.
features.done_when: validate-harness score >= 70, init.sh runs green, PR to dev merged
features.evidence: validate-harness 100/100 (2026-07-08); ./init.sh exit 0, flutter test +326 All tests passed!

features.name: Re-cut usn/* patch branch onto upstream 0.55.0
features.description: usn/0.54.0-elms-huge is based on upstream 0.54.0 while main/dev are at 0.55.0. Replay the UScoreNow patches (default font family, time-picker fixes, checkbox/radio sublabel fixes) onto 0.55.0 as usn/0.55.0-elms-huge, then bump the atomsn pin to the new tip.
features.done_when: new usn/0.55.0-elms-huge branch pushed, make check green on it, atomsn pubspec ref bumped to its tip and app verified
